positive: A minimalist, geometric celestial map illustration. Central composition features abstract constellations rendered in deep indigo and metallic gold line art, surrounding a detailed, stylized crescent moon and a cluster of simple, stylized planetary orbs. The overall design should mimic a vintage engraving mixed with modern vector aesthetics. The style should be highly graphic, using thick outlines and negative space effectively. Ideal for a clean, circular print centered on apparel. Studio lighting, high contrast, limited color palette (indigo, gold, cream background). Highly intricate, clean, symmetrical, suitable for textile printing.
